embeds.description:
🟢 **All Systems Operational**

Shared DM queue between both bots. Every outgoing DM from any cog is intercepted and inserted into a shared SQLite database. A coordinator loop assigns each DM to whichever bot has capacity, enabling automatic load balancing. The worker loop on each bot picks up its assigned DMs and delivers them.

📋 `dm_shared_queue.db` • Bots online: **2/2** • Refreshes every 30s

raw_data.content:
(remove submiaionss button when doing >endday)

We need an option, right when I do end day, to remove a submission, like, say, this was a false submission by someone. There needs to be, like, I can right remove or cancel, something like that. You know what I mean, for each submission, though, not for the whole day for that person. Do you feel what I'm saying? We need to be very smart, with minimal changes, obviously, and everything like that. Thank you. '
